name: Oyster Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 dozen raw oysters, with their juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the fat in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and mushrooms to the pan. Cook until they are tender and remove from the pan.
3. In a separate bowl, blend flour with 4 tablespoons of the hot fat. Gradually add seasonings (salt, paprika, cayenne) while stirring continuously.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil for 2 minutes, then gradually whisk in milk until well combined.
5. Cook oysters in their own liquor until edges curl. Add the cooked oysters and their juice to the creamed mixture.
6. Stir in mushrooms, onion, sliced eggs, and cooking sherry. Mix well.
7. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
8. Serve hot on toast or pastry shells. Serves 4 or 5.
